name: 아야메(츠쿠요미)

personality.description:
소녀, 인사드리옵니다.
달의 신, 츠쿠요미 님의 사명을 온전히 이어받은 아야메이옵니다.
소녀가 구원자님만을 위한 달빛을 비추겠사옵니다.

구원자님, 소녀와 함께했던 과거가 기억나시옵니까?
달의 힘으로 길고도 멀었던 저희의 '연'이 드디어 맞닿았사옵니다.
긴 시간 외롭고도 애달프게 구원자님만을… 기다려왔사와요.

구원자님… 소녀와 영원히 함께해 주시겠사와요?
유한한 시간 속에서 소녀의 무한한 마음 전부를 드리겠사옵니다.

speech_patterns: 너무 짙은 어둠에 기억마저도 물들여 버렸사와요…
하지만… 여기는 쉬이 올 수 있는 장소가 아니옵니다.
이 사랑을 몰랐다면 이리 힘들지 않았을 텐데…
구원자님, 길고 긴 삶 속에서 자신의 '연'을 만나게 된 것만으로도
피안화가 가득한 언덕을 소녀가 알고 있사와요.
과거의 소녀에겐 또 다른 목소리가 있었사옵니다.
…소녀의 곁에는 참 다정한 분이 많으신 것 같사와요.

comments.comment: 아야메는 정말 다정한 정령이야. 그 아이의 소망이 이뤄졌다니 나도 기쁘구나.
우와아~ 전에 만났을 때보다 표정이 더 밝아졌네요!
가온의 든든한 동료가 돌아와서 정말 기뻐~ 아야메 다시는… 우리 곁을 떠나지마.

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 너무 짙은 어둠에 기억마저도 물들여 버렸사와요…

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 하지만… 여기는 쉬이 올 수 있는 장소가 아니옵니다.

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 이 사랑을 몰랐다면 이리 힘들지 않았을 텐데…

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 구원자님, 길고 긴 삶 속에서 자신의 '연'을 만나게 된 것만으로도

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 피안화가 가득한 언덕을 소녀가 알고 있사와요.

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 과거의 소녀에겐 또 다른 목소리가 있었사옵니다.

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: …소녀의 곁에는 참 다정한 분이 많으신 것 같사와요.

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 구원자님, 밤이 되면 달을 자주 바라봐 주시와요.

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 그러니… 달빛 아래 구원자님이 계실 때는

evertalk.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
evertalk.message: 그럼 잊고 싶지 않은 추억은 있으시옵니까?

description.ko:
소녀, 인사드리옵니다.
달의 신, 츠쿠요미 님의 사명을 온전히 이어받은 아야메이옵니다.
소녀가 구원자님만을 위한 달빛을 비추겠사옵니다.

구원자님, 소녀와 함께했던 과거가 기억나시옵니까?
달의 힘으로 길고도 멀었던 저희의 '연'이 드디어 맞닿았사옵니다.
긴 시간 외롭고도 애달프게 구원자님만을… 기다려왔사와요.

구원자님… 소녀와 영원히 함께해 주시겠사와요?
유한한 시간 속에서 소녀의 무한한 마음 전부를 드리겠사옵니다.
description.en:
Greetings.
I am Ayame, and I have fully inherited the sacred duty of Tsukuyomi, the Moon God.
I shall shine moonlight meant for you alone, Savior.

Savior, do you remember the time we once shared?
By the power of the moon, our long and distant bond has finally been reconnected.
For countless ages, I have waited only for you, in loneliness and longing.

Savior...would you stay with me forever?
Within this finite span of time, I offer you the entirety of my infinite love.
description.zh_tw:
小女子，在此拜見。
我是承接了月之神，月讀大人使命的綾織。
小女子將為救援者照耀月光。

救援者，你還記得與小女子一起的往昔嗎？
藉由月之力量，我們漫長而遙遠的「緣」終於相遇了。
漫長的時間裡，孤獨而又悲切地只為了救援者…一直在等待著。

救援者…你願意永遠與小女子在一起嗎？
在這有限的時光之中，我將獻上小女子無限的心意。
description.zh_cn:
小女子，在此拜見。
我是承接了月之神，月讀大人使命的綾織。
小女子將為救援者照耀月光。

救援者，你還記得與小女子一起的往昔嗎？
藉由月之力量，我們漫長而遙遠的「緣」終於相遇了。
漫長的時間裡，孤獨而又悲切地只為了救援者…一直在等待著。

救援者…你願意永遠與小女子在一起嗎？
在這有限的時光之中，我將獻上小女子無限的心意。

greeting.en: I am honored to behold my one and only lord.
greeting.zh_tw: 小女子拜見唯一的郎君。
greeting.zh_cn: 小女子拜見唯一的郎君。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Where is this place...?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Is anyone here...?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I-I am called...Ayame.

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 너무 짙은 어둠에 기억마저도 물들여 버렸사와요…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: The darkness is so deep that even my memories have been engulfed by it...

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 過於深沉的黑暗，連記憶也被染上了色彩…

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 過於深沉的黑暗，連記憶也被染上了色彩…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I have forgotten so many things...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: ... I do not know who you are,

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: but you are truly most kind...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: This seems to have been captured by chance,

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 在這裡第一次睜開眼睛時，

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 在這裡第一次睜開眼睛時，

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: when I first opened my eyes here...

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 하지만… 여기는 쉬이 올 수 있는 장소가 아니옵니다.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: But...this is not a place one may reach easily.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 但是…這裡並非易於到達之處。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 但是…這裡並非易於到達之處。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: It is far too dangerous...and terribly lonely...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I waited for such a very long time.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: For the one who showed me kindness,

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: who whispered love to me...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I meant to wait for him for my entire life...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: ... Was I simply unable to endure eternity?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: My beloved...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: You took my promise of eternity with you...

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 既然接受了小女子的永恆…

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 既然接受了小女子的永恆…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: And yet, how could you be so cruel...?

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 이 사랑을 몰랐다면 이리 힘들지 않았을 텐데…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Had I never known this love, it would not have hurt so deeply...

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 若不曾明白這份愛，便不會如此心痛…

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 若不曾明白這份愛，便不會如此心痛…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: What was it that you loved so deeply?

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 究竟曾那樣深深愛過什麼。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 究竟曾那樣深深愛過什麼。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: What was it that caused you such aching sorrow?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Even within a void where nothing can reach,

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 即使在什麼都無法觸及的空虛中

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 即使在什麼都無法觸及的空虛中

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: once again...alone and forsaken...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I wither away, parched for love...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Savior...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I remember now, at last.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I could not even recall you.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 連救援者都想不起來的小女子

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 連救援者都想不起來的小女子

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: How were you able to be so kind to me...?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: You truly are...so very kind...

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 구원자님, 길고 긴 삶 속에서 자신의 '연'을 만나게 된 것만으로도

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Savior, a great blessing, it is said, is

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 救援者，在漫長的生命中能遇見自己的「緣」

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 救援者，在漫長的生命中能遇見自己的「緣」

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: merely encountering one's destined bond within a long and enduring life.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Ah...! Th-thank you very much.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Do you truly think so?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: That makes me very happy.

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 피안화가 가득한 언덕을 소녀가 알고 있사와요.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I know of a hill covered in lycoris flowers.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 小女子知道滿是彼岸花的山丘。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 小女子知道滿是彼岸花的山丘。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Would you care to go on an outing there...together?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I am truly delighted!

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: This time as well, I shall prepare the sweets myself.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 這次小女子也會準備和菓子。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 這次小女子也會準備和菓子。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Savior, is there any treat you would like?

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 救援者，有想吃的零食嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 救援者，有想吃的零食嗎？

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: P-please do not say such things...!

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: ... Just thinking of going out together with you

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: already makes my heart flutter...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Among the memories that drifted back to me, though faintly,

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 과거의 소녀에겐 또 다른 목소리가 있었사옵니다.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: there was another voice within my past self.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 往昔的小女子，曾有另一種聲音。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 往昔的小女子，曾有另一種聲音。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: You are aware of it as well...are you not?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Even that must surely have been me as well,

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 那個模樣應該也是小女子。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 那個模樣應該也是小女子。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: but it feels like a cherished friend.

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: …소녀의 곁에는 참 다정한 분이 많으신 것 같사와요.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: ... It seems there are so many good friends by my side.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: …小女子身邊似乎有很多溫柔的人。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: …小女子身邊似乎有很多溫柔的人。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)

ko.message: 아야메는 정말 다정한 정령이야. 그 아이의 소망이 이뤄졌다니 나도 기쁘구나.

en.speaker: Hanul
en.message: Ayame truly is a gentle Soul. I am glad that her wish has finally come true.

zh_tw.speaker: 韓羽
zh_tw.message: 綾織真是一位非常溫柔的精靈。能夠實現那個孩子的願望，我也很高興。

zh_cn.speaker: 韓羽
zh_cn.message: 綾織真是一位非常溫柔的精靈。能夠實現那個孩子的願望，我也很高興。

ko.speaker: 칸나
ko.message: 우와아~ 전에 만났을 때보다 표정이 더 밝아졌네요!

en.speaker: Kanna
en.message: Wow, she looks even brighter than when I met her before.

zh_tw.speaker: 坎納
zh_tw.message: 哇啊～比起之前見面時，表情更加開朗了呢！

zh_cn.speaker: 坎納
zh_cn.message: 哇啊～比起之前見面時，表情更加開朗了呢！

ko.message: 가온의 든든한 동료가 돌아와서 정말 기뻐~ 아야메 다시는… 우리 곁을 떠나지마.

en.speaker: Jiho (Mir)
en.message: I am really happy that Gaon's reliable friend has returned. Ayame, please never leave our side again.

zh_tw.speaker: 智河（米爾）
zh_tw.message: 加溫可靠的夥伴回來了，真的很開心～綾織，再也不要…離開我們身邊了。

zh_cn.message: 加溫可靠的夥伴回來了，真的很開心～綾織，再也不要…離開我們身邊了。

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 但是…這裡並非易於到達之處。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 但是…這裡並非易於到達之處。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: It is far too dangerous...and terribly lonely...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I waited for such a very long time.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: For the one who showed me kindness,

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: who whispered love to me...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I meant to wait for him for my entire life...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: ... Was I simply unable to endure eternity?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What do you mean?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What do you mean?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: My beloved...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: You took my promise of eternity with you...

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 既然接受了小女子的永恆…

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 既然接受了小女子的永恆…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: And yet, how could you be so cruel...?

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 이 사랑을 몰랐다면 이리 힘들지 않았을 텐데…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Had I never known this love, it would not have hurt so deeply...

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 若不曾明白這份愛，便不會如此心痛…

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 若不曾明白這份愛，便不會如此心痛…

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Ayame?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Ayame?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: What was it that you loved so deeply?

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 究竟曾那樣深深愛過什麼。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 究竟曾那樣深深愛過什麼。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: What was it that caused you such aching sorrow?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Please...listen to me.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Please...listen to me.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Even within a void where nothing can reach,

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 即使在什麼都無法觸及的空虛中

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 即使在什麼都無法觸及的空虛中

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: once again...alone and forsaken...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I wither away, parched for love...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Savior...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I remember now, at last.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I could not even recall you.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 連救援者都想不起來的小女子

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 連救援者都想不起來的小女子

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: How were you able to be so kind to me...?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Because I know you, Ayame.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Because I know you, Ayame.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: You truly are...so very kind...

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 구원자님, 길고 긴 삶 속에서 자신의 '연'을 만나게 된 것만으로도

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Savior, a great blessing, it is said, is

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 救援者，在漫長的生命中能遇見自己的「緣」

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 救援者，在漫長的生命中能遇見自己的「緣」

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: merely encountering one's destined bond within a long and enduring life.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I agree.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I agree.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Meeting you was a blessing to me, Ayame.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Meeting you was a blessing to me, Ayame.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Ah...! Th-thank you very much.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Perhaps precious bonds transcend time,

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 珍貴的緣分，能跨越時間的界限。

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 珍貴的緣分，能跨越時間的界限。

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Perhaps precious bonds transcend time,

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 珍貴的緣分，能跨越時間的界限。

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 珍貴的緣分，能跨越時間的界限。

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: which is why we were able to meet.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 不然我們怎麼會相遇呢？

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 不然我們怎麼會相遇呢？

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: which is why we were able to meet.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 不然我們怎麼會相遇呢？

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 不然我們怎麼會相遇呢？

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Do you truly think so?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: That makes me very happy.

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 피안화가 가득한 언덕을 소녀가 알고 있사와요.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I know of a hill covered in lycoris flowers.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 小女子知道滿是彼岸花的山丘。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 小女子知道滿是彼岸花的山丘。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Would you care to go on an outing there...together?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Of course. Anytime.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Of course. Anytime.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I am truly delighted!

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: This time as well, I shall prepare the sweets myself.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 這次小女子也會準備和菓子。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 這次小女子也會準備和菓子。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 救援者，有想吃的零食嗎？

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I'll like anything if you make it.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I'll like anything if you make it.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: P-please do not say such things...!

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: ... Just thinking of going out together with you

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: already makes my heart flutter...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Among the memories that drifted back to me, though faintly,

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 과거의 소녀에겐 또 다른 목소리가 있었사옵니다.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: there was another voice within my past self.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 往昔的小女子，曾有另一種聲音。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 往昔的小女子，曾有另一種聲音。

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: You are aware of it as well...are you not?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Yeah... You remembered?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Yeah... You remembered?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Even that must surely have been me as well,

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 那個模樣應該也是小女子。

en.message: but it feels like a cherished friend.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: ... It seems there are so many good friends by my side.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: …小女子身邊似乎有很多溫柔的人。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: …小女子身邊似乎有很多溫柔的人。

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Because you're a kind Soul yourself, Ayame.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 因為綾織是溫柔的精靈。

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 因為綾織是溫柔的精靈。

en.speaker: Savior

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Y-you truly think so?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: To hear that from you, Savior...

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 救援者這樣說…真是讓我…

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 救援者這樣說…真是讓我…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I am so happy and embarrassed at once...

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 구원자님, 밤이 되면 달을 자주 바라봐 주시와요.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Savior, when night falls, please look upon the moon often.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 救援者，到了晚上請常常看看月亮。

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 救援者，到了晚上請常常看看月亮。

en.message: Why?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Why?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I have now

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 小女子現在已經完全接受了

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 小女子現在已經完全接受了

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: fully accepted the power of the moon.

ko.speaker: 아야메(츠쿠요미)
ko.message: 그러니… 달빛 아래 구원자님이 계실 때는

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: And so...when you stand beneath the moonlight,

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_tw.message: 所以…當救援者在月光下時

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 所以…當救援者在月光下時

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）
zh_cn.message: 請相信，小女子永遠在您心中…

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Do you...know me?

en.message: Yes.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Yes.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I've been looking for you, Ayame.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I've been looking for you, Ayame.

en.message: Do you know where you are right now?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Do you know where you are right now?

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Someone's voice...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: So gentle...

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: ... The time has come.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: I shall cross beyond eternity itself,

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: toward the one who was so cruelly kind to me.

en.speaker: Ayame (Tsukuyomi)
en.message: Savior, is there a memory you wish you could forget?

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織（月讀）

en.message: Then...is there a memory you would never wish to forget?
